session.howItWorksDesc2: Administratoren können immer ohne Einschränkungen zugreifen

audit.title: Audit-Protokoll
audit.subtitle: Unveränderlicher Datensatz der Systemaktivitäten. Protokolle können nicht geändert oder gelöscht werden.
audit.infoDesc1: Protokolle sind unveränderlich und können nicht geändert oder gelöscht werden
audit.infoDesc2: Alle Aktionen werden aufgezeichnet: Anmeldung, Benutzeränderungen, Teams, Rollen, Berechtigungen
audit.infoDesc3: CSV-Export enthält alle gefilterten Protokolle (maximal 10.000 Datensätze)

home.heroTitle: Holen Sie Ihre Gelder von Online- und Krypto-Betrug zurück
home.heroSubtitle: 1 LAW SOLICITORS ist eine SRA-regulierte Anwaltskanzlei, spezialisiert auf Rückforderung von Geldern aus Online-Betrug, Krypto-Betrug und illegalen Brokern. Wir arbeiten mit INTERPOL und Pharos zusammen, um Ergebnisse zu garantieren.
home.formSubtitle: Ein Anwalt wird Ihren Fall innerhalb von 24 Stunden bewerten
home.tellUsWhatHappened: Erzählen Sie uns, was passiert ist
home.describeFraud: Beschreiben Sie den Betrug, wie er passiert ist und welche Beweise Sie haben...
home.regulatoryApprovals: Genehmigt und reguliert von führenden europäischen Behörden
home.servicesSubtitle: We offer specialized legal assistance for victims of online and cross-border financial fraud
home.cryptoScamsDesc: Fund recovery from fraudulent exchanges, fake ICOs and compromised wallets
home.forexFraudDesc: Legal action against unregulated brokers and fake trading platforms
home.illegalBrokersDesc: Disputes against brokers operating without license and market manipulation
home.fakePlatformsDesc: Cases against fraudulent investment sites and Ponzi schemes
home.scamProtectionDesc: Defense against scammers promising fake fund recovery
home.bankDisputesDesc: Assistance with chargebacks and refund requests to banks
home.internationalDisputesDesc: Cross-border legal case management with INTERPOL and Pharos partnership
home.evidenceAnalysisDesc: Detailed evaluation of evidence, transactions and legal case building
home.aboutDesc1: 1 LAW SOLICITORS LIMITED is a recognized law firm regulated by the Solicitors Regulation Authority (SRA ID: 8003758), specializing in legal disputes for online financial fraud and cross-border cases.
home.aboutDesc2: Our team of expert lawyers has successfully handled hundreds of cases of crypto fraud, forex, illegal brokers and fake investment platforms. We work with international partnerships including INTERPOL and Pharos (French Ministry) to ensure optimal results.
home.aboutDesc3: Through online and in-person methods, we guarantee fund recovery for our clients using advanced legal strategies, evidence analysis and negotiations with involved entities.
home.partnershipsDesc: Collaboration with INTERPOL and Pharos for cross-border cases
home.processSubtitle: A 6-step process to recover your funds through structured legal action
home.step1Desc: Fill out the form with fraud details, amount lost and available evidence
home.step2Desc: A lawyer examines your evidence, transactions and identifies available legal options
home.step3Desc: We develop a customized strategy based on your case circumstances
home.step4Desc: We send formal legal notices and initiate appropriate procedures
home.step5Desc: We negotiate with involved entities using international partnerships when necessary
home.step6Desc: Fund recovery or legal outcome depending on case and available evidence
home.successSubtitle: Real results for real clients - anonymized cases for privacy protection
home.faqSubtitle: Answers to the most common questions about the fund recovery process
home.faq1Q: How does the free consultation work?
home.faq1A: After submitting the form, a lawyer from our team will review your case within 24 hours. We will evaluate the evidence, transactions and circumstances of the fraud to determine available legal options. The initial consultation is completely free and without obligation.
home.faq2A: Ideally: screenshots of conversations, transaction confirmations, wallet addresses, contracts or agreements, evidence of communication with the scammers, bank statements. However, even with limited documentation we can evaluate the case and guide you in gathering the necessary evidence.
home.faq3Q: How long does fund recovery take?
home.faq3A: We guarantee fast results. In many cases, we get responses and results within 1 week of initiating legal action. Complex international cases may take longer. During the initial consultation we will provide an estimate based on your specific case.
home.faq4A: Yes, we have experience in cross-border disputes and collaborate with INTERPOL and Pharos (French Ministry) for international cases. We have successfully handled cases in over 35 countries, including situations with foreign exchanges, offshore brokers and international platforms.
home.faq5Q: When is it possible to recover funds?
home.faq5A: In many cases, legal action can help clients recover funds, depending on the evidence, transaction details and circumstances of the fraud. Key factors include: identifiability of the scammers, traceability of transactions, applicable jurisdiction, and timeliness of legal action. We guarantee recovery through online, in-person and international partnership methods.
home.faq6A: The initial consultation is free. For cases we decide to accept, we work with different fee structures depending on complexity: fixed fees, hourly fees, or success-based fees. We will discuss all options during the initial consultation and there will be no hidden costs.
home.faq7Q: Will I speak directly with a lawyer?
home.faq7A: Yes, after the initial case evaluation, you will be assigned a dedicated lawyer who will personally handle your case. You will have direct communication with your lawyer throughout the process, with regular updates on the case status.
home.dontWait: Don't wait. Every day counts. Get a free legal evaluation and discover how we can help you recover your funds through structured legal action.

successCases.fraudulentICOOutcome: 70% recovery through cross-border legal action with INTERPOL support
successCases.fakeTradingPlatformOutcome: Complete recovery through owner identification and UK legal action
successCases.investmentScamOutcome: 90% recovery through legal negotiation and Pharos support
successCases.ponziSchemeOutcome: 65% recovery through complex international legal procedure

thankYou.title: Vielen Dank für Ihre Anfrage!
thankYou.message: Wir haben die Details Ihres Falls erhalten. Unser Team aus erfahrenen Anwälten wird Ihre Anfrage sorgfältig prüfen und Sie innerhalb von 24 Stunden kontaktieren.
thankYou.step1: Ein Anwalt aus unserem Team wird Ihren Fall prüfen und die verfügbaren Beweise bewerten
thankYou.step2: Wir werden Sie telefonisch oder per E-Mail kontaktieren, um die verfügbaren rechtlichen Optionen zu besprechen
thankYou.step3: Die Erstberatung ist völlig kostenlos und unverbindlich
thankYou.footerTagline: Auf Fondsrückgewinnung aus Finanzbetrug spezialisierte Anwaltskanzlei
